hero.title: Rent Construction Equipment –
hero.subtitle: Over 800 rental products at 3 locations in NRW. From excavators to trailers – everything available online with weekend rates.
hero.notAvailable: This item is currently not available at any location.

locations.title: Our Locations
locations.subtitle: 3 locations in NRW – choose your location and explore the available equipment on site.
locations.heroSubtitle: 3 locations in NRW – always nearby. Personal advice, large selection and fast pickup guaranteed.
locations.deliveryToSiteDesc: Can't pick up the equipment yourself? No problem! We deliver construction machinery, trailers and more directly to your location throughout NRW.
locations.deliveryNote: * Prices excl. VAT, depending on equipment

steps.title: It's That Simple
steps.subtitle: Book online, pick up on site or have it delivered.
steps.step1Desc: Select your nearest location in NRW.
steps.step2Desc: Browse our catalog for the right equipment.
steps.step3Desc: Choose your rental period and book online – or on site during opening hours.
steps.step4Desc: By card, PayPal or cash on site. 30% deposit required online.
steps.step5Desc: Pick up your equipment or have it delivered.

cta.title: Ready for Your Next Project?
cta.subtitle: Whether private or business – we have the right equipment for you. Book online now or get personal advice.

benefits.fairPricesDesc: Transparent daily rates incl. weekend rates
benefits.flexibleTimesDesc: From one day to several weeks

rental.noProducts: No products available in this category.
rental.deliveryHint: Delivery costs are for estimation only. Select "Delivery desired" during booking – we will add the costs to your order.
rental.chooseLocationSubtitle: Available products and prices may vary by location.
rental.rentMadeEasyDesc: Over 800 products in 17 categories – from construction machinery to event equipment. Choose your location first for available products and prices.
rental.locationBasedPricesDesc: Each location has its own availability and conditions.
rental.deliveryPossibleDesc: We deliver directly to you – calculate delivery costs online.
rental.weekendRatesDesc: Rent Friday, return Monday – pay only 1 day!
rental.weekendTitle: Rent Friday, return Monday – pay only 1 day!
rental.weekendDesc: Many products include our popular weekend rate: Pick up Friday afternoon and return Monday morning – you only pay for one rental day.
rental.noArticlesFound: No items found. Please adjust your search or filters.
rental.noTrailersFound: No trailers found. Please adjust your filters.
rental.noMachinesFound: No machines found. Please adjust your filters.
rental.noProductsYetDesc: Products for this category will be added shortly. Feel free to contact us directly for inquiries.
rental.productNotFoundDesc: The product you are looking for does not exist or is no longer available.
rental.smsCodeSystemDesc: After booking, you will receive an SMS code to unlock the trailer.
rental.electronicLockDesc: Enter the code on the drawbar lock and take the trailer.
rental.selfPickupDesc: Pick up and return at the location – no waiting time.
rental.idRequired: ID required for identification during booking
rental.trailerSmsCodeDesc: Code valid only during rental period
rental.earthMovingDesc: Whether you want to rent a mini excavator, dumper or wheel loader, we have the right solution for your needs. Rent reliable and powerful machines from us to carry out your construction projects efficiently and successfully. With our excavators and dumpers you are perfectly equipped to move heavy loads and carry out earthworks.
rental.sustainableBuildingDesc: Want your project to be sustainable? We have fully electric dumpers!

products.weekendTitle: Rent Friday, return Monday – pay only 1 day!
